feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: A 1.55 R⊕ habitable-zone planet hosted by TOI-715, an M4 star near the ecliptic South Pole
entry.content:
Authors: J Jenkins - Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society

Abstract: ... study of exoplanetary atmospheres and the diversity of alien climates, allowing us to seek evidence ... We identify 18 potentially terrestrial planet candidates detected by the Transiting Exoplanet ... This research is in part funded by the European Union's ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Ultraviolet Radiation Effects on the Optical Properties of Water-Dominated Exoplanet Hazes

Abstract: ... Temperate sub - Neptune exoplanets could contain large inventories of water in various ... Haze particles are a key source of organic matter and may impact the evolution or origin of life , ... optical constants which may not match sub - Neptune ...

entry.title: Inulin-flaxseed protein nanoemulsion-based synbiotic bio-ink: effects of nanoemulsion and probiotics on 3D printability

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Sundarsingh, M Zhang, C Li, Z Guo - Food Bioscience, 2026

Abstract: This study evaluated a probiotic-loaded nanoemulsion complex prepared with inulin, stabilized with flaxseed protein (FSP), for use as a functional ink in 3D food printing. The nanoemulsion formulation exhibited increases in viscosity and surface tension ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Journal: 2026

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The modulation of the immune system during the early life of broiler chickens has been shown to have a beneficial effect on disease resistance and overall health. The present study investigated the effects of in ovo administration of xylo-and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: A unifying view on prebiotic compartmentalization?

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Ianiro - Trends in Chemistry, 2026

entry.title: Oxygenated False Positive Biosignatures in Mars-like Exoplanet Atmospheres
entry.content:
Authors: MT Seavey, S Domagal-Goldman, A Young, J Crouse... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Oxygen is a well-studied biosignature. Studying potential abiotic pathways for O2 build-up in exoplanet atmospheres is essential for evaluating whether the detection of O2 would constitute a biosignature detection on other worlds. Previous modeling ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Chromosome-Level Genome of the Adriatic Sturgeon, Acipenser naccarii: A Resource for Polyploid Fish Genomics
entry.content:
Authors: R Biello, A Scapolatiello, S Fava, VHM Mora, SD Palle... - Journal of Heredity, 2026

Abstract: Abstract The Adriatic sturgeon, Acipenser naccarii, a tetraploid species endemic to the North Adriatic region, has experienced significant population declines, resulting in its classification as "Critically Endangered" by the IUCN. Historically widespread in ...

Alert: Erich Jarvis (author alert)

entry.title: Masses of Potentially Habitable Planets Characterized by the Habitable Worlds Observatory
entry.content:
Authors: K Gary, BS Gaudi, E Bendek, T Robinson, R Hu... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Constraints on the masses of exoplanets directly imaged and characterized by the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) are crucial for categorizing these planets and interpreting their spectra. In particular, achieving a mass measurement with a ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Renyu Hu (author alert)

entry.title: TOI-4616 b: a benchmark Earth-sized planet transiting a nearby M4 dwarf
entry.content:
Authors: FZ Lang, BO Demory, Y Chew, Y Schmid... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Rocky exoplanets are particularly abundant around M-type stars. Their small radii and low luminosities provide favourable conditions for detecting transiting terrestrial planets and probing their atmospheric properties. We report the discovery and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Elsa Ducrot (author alert)

entry.title: Intrinsic Numerical Robustness and Fault Tolerance in a Neuromorphic Algorithm for Scientific Computing
entry.content:
Authors: BH Theilman, JB Aimone - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.10246, 2026

Abstract: The potential for neuromorphic computing to provide intrinsic fault tolerance has long been speculated, but the brain's robustness in neuromorphic applications has yet to be demonstrated. Here, we show that a previously described, natively spiking ...

Tags: brain

Alert: James B Aimone (author alert)

entry.title: The Brown Dwarf-Milky Way Connection: How Failed Stars Play a Unique Role in Galactic Archaeology
entry.content:
Authors: A Burgasser - American Astronomical Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: Our understanding of the formation and ongoing evolution of the Milky Way system has been shaped by our ability to map, chemically tag, and physically characterize its various stellar populations. Now, thanks to the exceptional depth and breadth ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Adam J. Burgasser (author alert)

entry.title: Lichens–growing greenhouses
entry.content:
Authors: M Grube

Abstract: Beards hanging from trees and colorful patches encrusting rocks are silent success stories of lichens, the fascinating life styles fungi can form with algae (Fig. 1). Lichens were show-cases to introduce the concept of symbiosis (as 'Symbiotismus'[1]). The ...

Alert: Martin Grube (author alert)

entry.title: AI or Human? Exploring the Effects of User Awareness in Conversational Dynamics with Virtual Avatars
entry.content:
Authors: SE Kober, S Streit, G Wood - Computers in Human Behavior, 2026

Abstract: Abstract With advancements in Large Language Models, AI chatbots are now widely used, offering near-human-like interactions. This study examines the emotional and psychological impacts of AI in communication, particularly when paired with human ...

Alert: Guilherme M. de O. Wood (author alert)
